channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pentagon halts 86-year-old U.S.-Canada defense board over Canada's spending
item.description: The Pentagon announced Monday it will suspend participation in the Permanent Joint Board on Defense, the key U.S.-Canada defense forum.

item.title: Georgia watchdog says Democrat-backed Supreme Court candidates broke rules
item.description: Two Democrat-backed candidates for Georgia Supreme Court violated judicial conduct rules, the state's judicial watchdog agency said.

item.title: Thomas Massie deserves to lose
item.description: Voters in his district should send the conspiracy theorist into retirement.

item.title: Kimberly Guilfoyle angers Greeks with McDonald's cheerleading
item.description: U.S. Ambassador to Greece Kimberly Guilfoyle drew criticism after promoting a new McDonald's opening as a diplomatic achievement.
